391.reason: [This condition is incorrect because it assumes that any declaration must be followed by two tokens before a '(' appears, but this doesn't properly distinguish between Decl and FuncDef. A VarDecl like "int x;" has no '(' at all, and the lookahead logic fails to handle the grammar structure correctly.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is incorrect because it assumes that any declaration must be followed by two tokens before a '(' appears, but this doesn't properly distinguish between Decl and FuncDef. A VarDecl like "int x;" has no '(' at all, and the lookahead logic fails to handle the grammar structure correctly.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect condition for detecting Decl vs FuncDef: peek(2) may go out of bounds and doesn't correctly identify function definitions which start with FuncType (VOIDTK/INTTK/CHARTK) followed by IDENFR and LPARENT. This can cause misclassification of FuncDef as Decl or infinite loops.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is incorrect because it assumes that any sequence without LPARENT at position +2 must be a Decl, but FuncDef also starts with BType (INTTK/CHARTK/VOIDTK) followed by IDENFR and then LPARENT. The lookahead of 2 tokens doesn't properly distinguish between VarDecl (which has IDENFR after BType) and FuncDef (which also has IDENFR after BType). This will cause FuncDef to be incorrectly parsed as Decl when the function name identifier is at position +1 and LPARENT is at position +2, making peek(2) == LPARENT and thus skipping the Decl loop, but the logic is fragile and fails in cases where there are no declarations before function definitions.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition peek(2) != TokenType.LPARENT is incorrect for determining Decl boundaries. It fails to properly distinguish between variable declarations and function definitions, as both can start with 'int' or 'char'. A function definition has '(' after the identifier, but checking only peek(2) doesn't account for the full structure and may cause misclassification.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect condition for distinguishing Decl from FuncDef. Decl starts with 'const', 'int', or 'char', but FuncDef can also start with 'int'/'char' followed by identifier and '(', so peek(2) check is unreliable and will cause misclassification]

397.reason: [This condition is also flawed because it assumes that FuncDef continues until MAINTK is found one token ahead, but this doesn't account for cases where there are no FuncDefs or when the token stream doesn't align with this expectation. The proper approach should check the current token type to decide what to parse next.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is also flawed because it assumes that FuncDef continues until MAINTK is found one token ahead, but this doesn't account for cases where there are no FuncDefs or when the token stream doesn't align with this expectation. The proper approach should check the current token type to decide what to parse next.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect condition for detecting FuncDef vs MainFuncDef: peek(1) assumes the next token after current position determines main function, but doesn't account for proper function definition structure. Should check current token type instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is also flawed because it assumes that everything before MAINTK must be FuncDef, but doesn't verify that the current token sequence actually forms a valid FuncDef. It should check for valid FuncType (VOIDTK/INTTK/CHARTK) followed by IDENFR and LPARENT, not just rely on MAINTK not being at position +1.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition peek(1) != TokenType.MAINTK is also flawed. It assumes that after declarations, all non-main tokens belong to FuncDef, but doesn't properly validate the function definition structure. This can lead to parsing errors when encountering main function or other constructs.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect condition for distinguishing FuncDef from MainFuncDef. Should check for function signature pattern rather than just next token not being MAINTK]
